title: Men's pendant line: vectorize the 2D spec sketch + retouch and catalog-prep the sample studio shots
one_line_ask: From the industrial designer's raster pendant sketch and two mixed-lighting workbench photos of a stainless-steel sample pendant and chain, produce a clean factory-ready vector spec asset plus retouched, isolated, color-accurate catalog hero shots (one expanded to a catalog canvas, one duotone print-screen variant) and gather everything on a Firefly board for the design team.

issues: Very slight warm cast from left lamp creates minor uneven illumination across pendant face — acceptable per brief
Bail/loop at top is slightly off-center relative to pendant body — minor but within documentary tolerance
Background bench surface is dark steel rather than off-white, which slightly reduces contrast separation between subject and surface — designer will need select_by_prompt for clean extraction
Shallow DoF causes very mild softness at bottom-left corner of pendant — acceptable documentary characteristic
A few metal filings/dust specks visible on bench surface — intentional per brief
